meaning: adj.自我中心的,利己主义的n.利己主义者
examples: He was egocentric, a man of impulse who expected those around him to serve him.
In fact, Guugu Yimithirr doesn't make any use of egocentric coordinates at all.
Egocentric goals also meant individuals competed for resources, which undermined the group as a whole.
Others blame the look-at-me-I'm-so-special culture bred by egocentric social networking sites such as Facebook, My Space, and Twitter.
